main.name: Zain
main.occupation: Voice Systems Builder — VoIP, SIP & Communication Systems
main.description: I build and operate voice systems, focusing on VoIP infrastructure, SIP-based communication, backend APIs, and AI-powered voice workflows.
main.bio: I'm Zain, an independent developer building Voice Operations SaaS. I design and operate voice systems using VoIP, SIP infrastructure, backend services, automation, and AI voice technologies for real-time communication workflows.
main.contactmessage: Interested in voice systems, automation, or backend infrastructure? Let's connect.

projects.title: Voice Operations SaaS Platform
projects.about: A voice system platform for handling call workflows, SIP-based routing, and communication automation using backend orchestration and cloud telephony integration.

projects.title: Discord AI Voice Assistant
projects.about: An AI assistant for Discord built with OpenAI and ElevenLabs, supporting conversational AI, voice interaction, and automation features.

projects.title: Voice Systems & SIP Toolkit
projects.about: Tools for SIP routing, call monitoring, AMD detection, and voice system observability in production environments.

projects.title: Roblox Game Project
projects.about: A Roblox game built with Lua scripting and Roblox Studio, focused on gameplay mechanics and interactive experience.

projects.title: Discord Game Bot (In Progress)
projects.about: A Discord bot under development focused on game mechanics, interaction systems, and community engagement features.

projects.title: E-commerce Web App (In Progress)
projects.about: A web application with product management, checkout flow, and Stripe payment integration.
